- June 30, 2022 Total assets: 218,901,423
- September 30, 2022 Total assets: 208,360,809  
- Absolute change: |208,360,809 - 218,901,423| = 10,540,614
- QoQ percent change: 10,540,614 / 218,901,423 × 100 = 4.815%
